CustomField.description: Controls when NPPatch creates installment Opportunities for Recurring Donations. Options include: "Always_Create_Next_Installment" (default, creates the next installment as soon as one closes), "Disable_First_Installment" (skips creating the first installment on new RDs), "Disable_All_Installments" (never auto-creates). Applies to Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When to auto-create installment Opportunities for Recurring Donations. Default is "Always Create Next Installment."
CustomField.label: Installment Opportunity Auto-Creation
